svg.text: → Login via Firebase Auth · Upload to Firebase Storage
→ Chat & presence via Firestore · REST API → Backend (+ Firebase ID token)
→ Stripe SDK · Apple Pay · Google Pay · FCM push notifications
Sends Firebase ID token on every backend request
IDs only — no PII in payload
→ Validate Firebase tokens · Matching pipeline (@Scheduled) · Business rules
→ RBAC @PreAuthorize · Rate limiting per IP · Stripe webhook handling
→ Secrets from GCP Secret Manager · All integrations behind ports
→ Zero PII in logs · AuditEvent on all security actions
Zero card data — Stripe IDs only
